description: This geometric diagram illustrates the ranging characteristics of an active imaging system, likely a Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) sensor. A vertical blue line, labeled R₀, represents the nominal range from the sensor (top of the diagram) to a point A on the ground, represented by a horizontal blue line. The top of the signal beam or pulse has a width labeled D, indicated by a double-headed orange arrow. The dashed orange lines form a triangle representing the extent of the radar beam. On the horizontal ground line, a segment centered at point A is labeled Δt, indicating a horizontal dimension, possibly related to temporal or spatial resolution. Below the horizontal ground line, a broader horizontal dashed orange line segment is labeled L, representing the total ground footprint or swath width of the radar signal.
